sentence: Production decode teams rarely fail for lack of framework features---they fail because compiler and kernel schedules violate residency, launch, and bandwidth contracts on the SKU they actually ship .
title: Memory-Bound but Not Bandwidth-Limited: The Physical AI Inference Gap in Batch-1 LLM Decode
